title: vault-config.yaml — relationships section
description: Canonical input contract for `scripts/vault-config-writer.py relationships`. The writer renders the top-level `relationships:` block of vault-config.yaml from this JSON, replacing any previous block while leaving the rest of the file byte-for-byte untouched.

marker.description: Prefix that identifies this relationship when reading (e.g. 'up::', 'related::', 'parent').

format.description: Template for writing this relationship. MUST contain the literal token {{link}}.

position.description: Where in the note the relationship is written.

location_type.description: inline = body pattern match; frontmatter = YAML key lookup.

multi.description: true = multiple links allowed; false = single link only.

separator.description: How multiple links are joined when multi=true. Typical: ', '.
